title: Kee (Devaronian)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Kee}} {{Citation}} {{Character |type=Criminal |image=[[File:Kee_Legacy_14.jpg]] |name=Kee |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]][[Legacy (2006) 16|''Legacy'' (2006) 16]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]]''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]'' |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin=Orange |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=Crew of the ''[[Grinning Liar]]'' |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Kee, first mate of the ''Grinning Liar''—Devaronian kit with a talent for bio and micro-circuitry.''"
"''Flattery gets you exactly nothing. Imp.|Morrigan Corde and Kee|}} '''Kee''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Pilot/Legends|copilot]] and [[Technician/Legends|mechanic]] onboard the ''[[Grinning Liar]]'', a [[YX-1980 space transport]] belonging to the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] [[Chak (Wookiee)|Chak]]. She enjoyed taking mechanical things apart just for the joy of reassembling them and specialized in micro/biocircuitry. ==Biography== {{Quote|Do they bite?''"
"Nagoola''—you just gotta know how to treat 'em. We can rig 'em with miniature cams here—and here…''"
"''Don't hog 'em! Let me see!|Kee and Jariah Syn, discussing Yuuzhan Vong bugs|[[Legacy (2006) 17|''Legacy'' (2006) 17]]}} [[File:Keeandchak23.jpg|thumb|left|150px|Chak with Kee.]] Kee was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]] who was present when [[Cade Skywalker]] visited [[Rik's Cantina/Legends|Rik's Cantina]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in [[137 ABY]]. She threatened him with a [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], hoping he could reveal where her former crew members, [[Jariah Syn]] and [[Deliah Blue]] had absconded with the ''[[Grinning Liar]]'', which they had rented after leaving Cade's employ. Unfortunately, Cade was unable to help her or [[Chak (Wookiee)|Chak]], though he made a joking pass at her.[[Legacy (2006) 14|''Legacy'' (2006) 14]] After Cade became enthralled to the [[One Sith|Sith]], Kee along with Chak joined the crew of the Mynock in Cade's rescue as a necessary step to reaquiring the ''Grinning Liar'' which had somehow ended up in the hands of [[Rav]]. Kee, along with Chak, Deliah Blue, and Jariah Syn, were later hired by [[Morrigan Corde]] to help rescue Cade, who was her son. She assisted Syn in attaching miniature cameras to [[Yuuzhan Vong]] bugs Corde obtained from the Empire. After three weeks, when they finally managed to locate Cade and his attempt to escape the [[Temple of the Sith]], Kee commented on how he is "chucking [[Darth Talon|Darth Hottie]] out the [[Airlock/Legends|airlock]]. Kee flew with Chak, Corde, Blue and Syn in the ''Mynock'' over the Temple. She made a sarcastic joke about one of the craziest things Syn has ever done. The mission ended in Cade's escape from the Sith. She later accompanied Chak, Cade, and Syn in an attempt to get the ''Grinning Liar'' back from Rav. After retrieving the ship, she wished Cade well and asked him to say goodbye to Blue for her. When he told her that the two weren't interacting, the Devaronian called him a [[Nerf herder/Legends|nerfherder]] and encouraged him to talk to her. ==Behind the scenes== [[File:ChakAndKee.jpg|thumb|right|Kee and Chak concept art.]] [[Jan Duursema]], the main penciller behind the Legacy comics in which Kee first appeared has stated that Kee is in no way related to [[Vilmarh Grahrk]].{{DHBoards|subdomain=www|url=boards/viewtopic.php?p=165139#165139|thread=LEGACY 16 No fair! He kicked sand in my eye! (SPOILERS)|nobackup=1}} ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Kee}} *[[Legacy (2006) 14|''Legacy'' (2006) 14]] {{1st}} *[[Legacy (2006) 16|''Legacy'' (2006) 16]] *[[Legacy (2006) 17|''Legacy'' (2006) 17]] *[[Legacy (2006) 18|''Legacy'' (2006) 18]] *[[Legacy (2006) 19|''Legacy'' (2006) 19]] *[[Legacy (2006) 23|''Legacy'' (2006) 23]] ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: Legacy (2006) 0|''Star Wars: Legacy'' (2006) 0]] {{1stm}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Legacy Era Campaign Guide]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |cs=Kee |de=Kee (Devaronianerin) |pl=Kee (Devaronianka) }} [[Category:Devaronians]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]] [[Category:Mechanics]] [[Category:Pilots]] [[Category:Smugglers]]
